title: abutilon indicum
intro: Abutilon indicum, also known as Indian mallow or country mallow, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Abutilon indicum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and powders, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
